name: Rindfleisch-Eintopf (Beef Stew)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the shortening in a Dutch oven.
2. Add the meat and brown on all sides.
3. Place the onions on top of the meat.
4. Mix the flour, celery seeds, salt, sugar, and mustard with 1/4 cup water to form a paste.
5. Blend the paste with the tomatoes.
6. Pour the mixture into the Dutch oven.
7. Bake at 325°F for about 2 hours, or until the meat is fork-tender.
8. Serve with oven-browned potatoes.
